title: Panisea mandarinorum
taxonomy: Panisea mandarinorum is classified as a species of orchid within the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Panisea, which is a small group of orchids. The Panisea genus is a part of the subtribe Coelogyneinae and the tribe Epidendroideae. This orchid is native to the tropical regions of Asia, and its classification is used to understand its evolutionary relationships and unique characteristics.
